title: Skill Management
subtitle: Manage ArmorClaw skill plugins, enable or disable capabilities

custom.importHint: Import a single SKILL.md file or a complete folder containing SKILL.md. OpenClaw will automatically recognize new skills.
custom.emptyHint: Click the button above to import your SKILL.md file
custom.desktopOnly: Custom skill management is only available in the desktop client

config.step1: Open terminal and enter the container
config.step2: Copy the command below and paste it into the terminal (modify values first)
config.step3: After saving, restart Gateway or refresh this page
config.writeCommand: Execute the following command in terminal to write config (modify placeholder values):
config.overwriteWarning: ⚠️ Note: This command will overwrite existing openclaw.json. To merge with existing config, first use

install.manualInstallHint: The above tools need to be manually installed in the container before using this Skill.
install.afterInstall: Please open terminal and execute the above command, then retry one-click install.
install.afterSteps: Please open terminal and follow the steps above, then refresh the page.

remediation.aptNotFound: Neither apt nor npm can automatically install "{{pkg}}". Please refer to the official documentation below to install manually in terminal:
remediation.brewNotSupported: Homebrew (brew) is not applicable to the current container environment. It is recommended to manually install this tool via:
remediation.pipNotFound: pip is not installed in the container. Please switch to root in terminal and execute the following command:
remediation.goNotFound: Go toolchain is not installed in the container. Please execute the following command as root in terminal to install:
remediation.npmNotFound: npm is not found in the container. Please switch to root in terminal and execute the following command:
remediation.stepOpenTerminal: 1. Open terminal and enter the container
remediation.stepOpenTerminalRoot: 1. Open terminal and enter the container (as root: su -)
remediation.stepFindInstall: 2. Refer to the official link below to find the Linux/Debian installation method
remediation.stepFindInstallApt: 2. Refer to the official link below to find the Linux/Debian installation method (usually apt or direct binary download)
remediation.stepRefresh: 3. After installation, return to this page and refresh

error.fetchCustomFailed: Failed to fetch custom skill list

macosOnly.message: This Skill only supports macOS ({{os}}). The current Linux container environment is not compatible.

fields.token: token - Bot Token (get from Discord Developer Portal)
